name: Great Vegetarian Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Chopped canned green chiles, undrained
3 cups Canned red kidney beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onion and garlic in a large skillet or saucepan and cook, covered, over low heat until soft, stirring frequently to prevent scorching.
2. Add all other ingredients and mix thoroughly.
3. Cook over medium heat until bubbling hot.
